Chip Explorer v2.1.2.0

run_v212_prefill · prefill · throughput calibrated to ±18% vs A100/H100/MI300 · cumulative buildable library across 11 GCN iterations
Every chip passed first-order thermal / power-delivery / signal-integrity feasibility gates (reduced-order models). Throughput is calibrated to real silicon (±18% vs A100/H100/MI300); power, area, cost and the gates are reduced-order — treat absolute non-throughput values as directional, calibration in progress. Drag a metric handle to filter; cross out a package value; the scatter and stats update live. Showing 6,000 of 105,157 buildable designs (Pareto frontier + stratified sample).
